domain: Quechua chasqui Inca relay system (Qhapaq Ñan + chaskiwasi stations every 2.5km; fresh runner per segment; oral message + quipu knotted-cord summary; verification-repetition handoff)
specific_mechanism: Fixed-segment memoryless handoff cascade with compressed quipu-style summary + verification-repetition until next agent confidence ≥ threshold.
llm_application: CHASQUI-RELAY: fixed-segment multi-agent information cascade. Specialised agents A_1...A_K each execute one reasoning segment (e.g., 2-3 reasoning steps). At segment boundary, agent A_k produces (a) a compressed-string quipu summary (≤ 200 tokens), (b) repeats the summary up to 3 times until receiving agent A_{k+1}'s confidence ≥ threshold (verification-repetition). A_{k+1} starts with NO access to A_k's internal state — memoryless handoff using only the quipu summary. Differs from Anthropic multi-agent research system (full-context handoff option), Google ADK summarisation (sliding window, not memoryless), pipeline cascade (no verification-repetition) by combining (a) STRICTLY MEMORYLESS handoff, (b) VERIFICATION-REPETITION threshold, (c) FIXED-SEGMENT specialisation.
novelty_claim: Multi-agent handoff orchestration + ADK summarisation + Anthropic research system already exist. CHASQUI-RELAY recombines memoryless + verification-repetition + fixed-segment. Recombination.
